data.title: Andesite Achieves FedRAMP High Authorized, Bringing Human-AI SOC to Federal Civilian Agencies
data.description: The company Andesite will be implementing its Human-AI Security Operations Center (SOC) system to government agencies for crucial cyber defense purposes. In a recent announcement on March 31, 2026, Andesite disclosed attaining Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP) Authorized status.

data.title: Monarch Quantum Surpasses $100M in Capital and Contracts with $55M Growth Round to Scale Quantum Photonics Infrastructure
data.description: Monarch Quantum recently completed an oversubscribed growth round, raising a total of $55 million. This brings the company's total capital and contracts to over $115 million in just six months since its founding. The round was led by Serendipity Capital and saw participation from 55 North and Global Innovation Labs. Monarch Quantum's innovative Quantum Light Engines™ offer scalable photonics infrastructure.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: A Sweet Time at the NYSE as Hershey Hosts its Investor Day
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issues a daily pre-market advisory from the NYSE Trading Floor. As of March 31, 2026, investors can access the latest market insights before the market opens. This update is crucial for understanding the early market trends. Stay informed with the NYSE's pre-market updates to make informed investment decisions.

data.title: Shantel Jackson Expands Shoe Gummi Into a Multi-Category Foot Comfort Brand and Launches Original Series
data.description: In Los Angeles on March 31, 2026, entrepreneur and inventor Shantel Jackson announced her plans to expand her patented high heel innovation, Shoe Gummi. This innovative technology, the first of its kind to address high-heel discomfort, is being transformed into a multi-category foot comfort brand. Jackson is also venturing into media as part of this expansion. No specific numbers are provided in the original news piece.

data.title: POTTERY BARN KIDS LAUNCHES COLLABORATION WITH TUTU DU MONDE
data.description: A new collaboration has been unveiled by Pottery Barn Kids, a brand under Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM), the leading digital-first, design-focused, and eco-friendly home retailer in the world. This partnership involves Tutu du Monde, a well-known children's fashion brand recognized for its ethereal tutus and couture dresses embellished by hand. The special Tutu du Monde for Pottery Barn Kids line showcases the fashion brand's distinctive style, featuring delicate tulle and intricate embellishments.

data.title: VergeIO Delivers RTX Virtual Workstations to Enterprises
data.description: Today, VergeIO, a private cloud operating system company based in Ann Arbor, Michigan, revealed that they now support NVIDIA RTX vWS and vPC on the newest vGPU 20 release. This update allows customers to utilize graphics-heavy professional applications from cloud-hosted virtual desktops. NVIDIA has officially recognized VergeOS as a supported platform for RTX vWS enabled through GPU virtualization. This integration offers automated GPU management and intelligent processing capabilities.

data.title: Singapore court intervenes in crypto dispute, orders OneKey founder & user to stop making threats amid Resupply exploit conflict.
data.description: OneKey founder Wang Lei and an individual known as X have been ordered by a court to cease making any threatening or defamatory statements against a contributor associated with Curve following a conflict related to the 2025 Resupply exploit. The court's decision mandates that both parties refrain from any further negative claims or actions.

data.title: $450 billion in Bitcoin could face quantum threat; analysts stress the need for developers to address vulnerabilities to secure new record highs for BTC.
data.description: According to an analyst, the price of Bitcoin (BTC) may struggle to reach a new all-time high if developers do not address quantum threats promptly. The lack of serious attention to these threats could hinder the potential growth of BTC's value in the future. This warning highlights the importance of developers staying vigilant in the face of quantum risks to ensure the stability and security of the cryptocurrency.Failure to address these issues could impede BTC's ability to surpass its previous record high.

data.title: Co-PSMA data published in the European Urology journal
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Clarity Pharmaceuticals (ASX: CU6) released news stating their aim to enhance cancer treatment outcomes by creating advanced products. The company, a clinical-stage radiopharmaceutical firm, is focused on innovating for the benefit of patients.

data.title: EDB Postgres® AI Delivers Superior Predictability vs. Cloud Data Warehouses in High-Concurrency Benchmark, Unveils Q1 Platform Updates to Power the Agentic AI Era
data.description: A recent study conducted by McKnight Consulting Group discovered that EDB Postgres AI for WarehousePG can lead to an impressive 58% reduction in costs and improved consistency in concurrent performance. The findings also highlighted that the new platform incorporates enhanced features that expedite the preparedness for autonomous AI workflows. This groundbreaking information was disclosed on March 31, 2026, in WILLMINGTON, Delaware.

data.title: StoneX Payments Expands Capabilities Through the Acquisition of a Wholesale Banknotes Business
data.description: StoneX Financial Ltd has completed the acquisition of WCS International Ltd (WCSI), a wholesale banknotes trading and distribution company situated in the UK.

data.title: Biodance Announces Its 'Last Chance Spring Sale,' With Up to 30% Off Viral Hydrogel Products
data.description: Biodance, a top Korean beauty brand known for its groundbreaking hydrogel masks, has introduced new Jelly Serum Mists and Eye Patches alongside their popular Hydrogel Masks. The company, based in SEOUL, South Korea, has recently announced a 'Last Chance Spring Sale' beginning on March 31, 2026. This sale comes after the tremendous success of their skincare products in the market.
